entry.title: How to separate automatic inventory accounts for goods issue using the same movement type (601)?
entry.content:
For each goods issue transaction, the accounting should be posted to different accounts. For example, sales goods issue is different from goods issue for free. However, in the current Best Practice Public Cloud, both of these transactions are assigned to the same Movement Type 601 (exp: BD9 vs BKA). Is there any way to change the movement type?

Thanks and best regards,

entry.title: Re: Eclipse, Field for creation user is missing in source...
entry.content: How did you do it exactly? I have replaced createdby and lastchangedby accordingly, but the error is still showing.

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion is not functioning incorrect setu...
entry.content: Could you check within Check Exchange Rate Types (102349 configuration activity) if there is still a kind of legacy 'reference currency' in your Rate Types Customizing after Change of Functional Currency execution ?

entry.title: Re: How to Consume SAP Data Warehouse Cloud in Power BI
entry.content:
Hi, 

Fantastic blog thanks for the insights! 

How can we secure the data exposed to Power BI? ODBC uses a database user, meaning DACs no longer apply. Therefore, in Datasphere should we maintain two sets of authorizations (DAC's at the DSP Level and Database User's at the Database level)? Or can you suggest an alternative approach? 

Thanks in advance for any advice you can provide on this issue.

entry.title: Re: Assigning the material name into CT04 characteristic
entry.content: In that case I have unfortunately no solution. Maybe someone else from the SAP community does. Otherwise, I would recommend you to look into programming a function that fetches the value from MAKT.

entry.title: How to completely refresh table control in dynpro
entry.content: Solved.

entry.title: Re: Excel Add in Doesn't Connect to SAC
entry.content: @Matan, Were you able to solve the above issue. Looks like even am facing the same issue. When i login, it accepts my credentials, but then it opens up a new external browser tab for SAC, but nothing happens. Also, I feel ideally it should be open SAC in the Excel itself and not in the external browser. Why is it doing this, any resolution?

entry.title: I would like to know data creation for this api "FAA_FIXED_ASSET_CREATE_MAIN_WEBI"in s4hana system.
entry.content:
When I create data for Fixed Asset of this api "FAA_FIXED_ASSET_CREATE_MAIN_WEBI" by using soap in s4hana system with required field as documentation, it is not ok and there is no sample payload for this api in documentation.

So, I would like to know data creation for this api "FAA_FIXED_ASSET_CREATE_MAIN_WEBI" by using soap in s4hana system. If there is any payload, please let me know.

Best regards,

Poe

entry.title: SAP GUI for html settings in Fiori Launchpad not saved after we close the browser window or browser.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have made some settings in SAP GUI for HTML with in Fiori Launchpad as below.

But once I click on save, for the first time pop-up is being shown. But when I close the browser window or browser and then login to the same page settings are not persistent.

Could you please suggest what needs to be done or is it something related to patch upgrade.

Thanks,

Teja.

entry.title: Re: How to install DTW on client/workstation PC's with SA...
entry.content:
From the installation package of the version you install and that's it.
User, each one his own, so that the information of the user who created it is saved.

entry.title: Change Logs when using Fiori Applications
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Recently we have started to look at activating Standard Fiori applications for standard business transactions where users can Manage documents like Sales documents, Purchasing documents and Billing documents. We have noticed few things and want to understand how can this can be handled in a better way.

  • Origin of transaction missing when creating documents from Fiori. For example when we post a JV in finance from Fb01 we can see in the header of the accounting document the transaction is FB01 or FB70. But when we use Fiori to post this we see this empty. I can understand that BAPI is used for all updates but will be good to have either the App id or some kind of reference populated. this becomes a audit issue to track from where the document originates. The same goes for Change logs in Sales documents - Missing Tcode on the change logs. 
  • All the custom screen validation that was done in our PBO/PAI are not being called and again I assume its due to BAPI. Do we need to completely redesign all the validations or is there any other smarter approach? 
  • Attaching workflow into Standard Fiori apps - Sometimes we also see that business needs to have a approval flow for some master data records before being created. We can go to SAP build and do it or create custom Fiori app and enable workflow. Has anyone done it with using the standard Fiori application and attaching a workflow for approval and then once approved the master data getting created?  (this can be more a custom requirement) 
  • Another this is that the user is not having VA01 or VA02 access in the PFCG roles but when we activated Manage Sales order Version2 app and try to use the user got access to create the Sales order for the document type enabled via Fiori. We have only added the UI roles and not changes the existing role of the user. Again is this because of BAPI and how well can this be restricted using standard capabilities?

 

Appreciate your insights.

 

Br,

Vijay V

entry.title: Re: Db2 odbc connection to S4 HANA in RISE
entry.content: hi experts. Any suggestions please.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
Hi @Madhu2004 ,

you should have a basic understanding of JavaScript to understand the conceptual differences between using TypeScript and JavaScript with CAP. That shouldn't hinder you to join the session anyway for you to get insight in how you could get started with TypeScript and CAP. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Goods issue with wrong unit cost.
entry.content:
Hi,

If the ending quantity is correct, using Inventory Revaluation is the best way in this case.

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Field for creation user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL.
entry.content:
I'm trying to generate ABAP Repository Object by the instruction of "Building an ABAP RESTful Application" topic of Learning the Basics of ABAP Programming on SAP BTP provided by Learn SAP site.

But the generation of the repository object causes an error, displaying, "Field for creation user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL." and "Field for change user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL."

As per the solution that was given by SAP community, I modified the createdby field to abp_creation_user and lastchangedby to abp_lastchange_user, but the error still occurs. Please help.

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification

Hi all,

the best way to prepare for the Activate certification is to go through our FREE learning journeys:

- (ACT100): Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology

and

- (ACT200): Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery

Thank you,

Omar

Hey,

Fill-up and pick-up are the only EWM relevant processes. And this should work as well in combination with EWM. See following blog for V2020: Customer Consignment process with S4 HANA EWM 2020 - SAP Community

entry.content: You didn't follow the upgrade note when upgrade from 8.81 to 10 directly. Best of luck, guy!

entry.title: Re: 0FIAA_SIM values in 0FI_AA_12
entry.content:
Hi Karthik,

 

No, the 0FI_AA_12 extractor does not support generating simulated depreciation for future years beyond the current year. It typically provides data up to the current period, so it won't satisfy the requirement for future periods like 2025-2028.

entry.title: SAP BODS Connectivity with BW on Cloud
entry.content: Hi All - Our client is migrating their BW system from on-premise to cloud, can we connect to BW on cloud from SAP BODS (on premise) directly with updating the existing Datastore config ?

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content: I don't know RVV50R10C, so I don't know if it can run in background. I guess that it can send standard error messages and that will stop the background job. If you don't want to stop the job for your message, you should send it as type 'S' instead of 'E'. I guess that the user exit is called in other contexts, so you should add a condition.

entry.title: How the IP is logged in CAP audit log
entry.content: For CAP data access in audit log viewer I don't see IP address begin logged. How is IP added in the audit log?

entry.title: Re: Field for creation user is missing in source referenc...
entry.content:
Hi 

The error indicates that your table `ZXX_GROCERY` is missing required fields for user tracking (`CREATED_BY` and `LAST_CHANGED_BY`).

Here's how to fix it

1. Add Fields to Your Table
Open your table definition (`ZXX_GROCERY`).
Add two fields `CREATED_BY` and `LAST_CHANGED_BY`. Both should be of type `USER` or `CHAR` with length `12`.

2. Activate the Table
After adding the fields, activate the table.

3. Check Repository Object
Retry generating the repository object.

These fields are necessary for tracking creation and modification users in ABAP RESTful applications.

 

Regards,

Umasaral

entry.title: Re: Material Analysis Report
entry.content: Nice article. Unfortunately, MC.9 is no longer supported in S/4HANA ☹️

entry.title: Re: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content:
Hello Sandra_Rossi,

RVV50R10C running through background job only but i can't make message as success because it will create the delivery for the current record, want to stop the execution for the current record when the validation is success and store the message in the job log and go for the next record to process. 

Will it work like this, if i write like below?

Inside the Implicit enhancement if i create a custom function module like below
call zfunc

exporting v1

exceptions

error_message = n_error

zfunc (implementation)

if xyz = '1'.

message ' Throw error' type 'E'.

endif.

entry.title: Re: How to Disable and enable replication in HANA DB when primary secondary and tertiary nodes are p
entry.content:
post disable replication :

hdbnsutil -sr_unregister needs a running HDB , must be done before stopping.

entry.title: Re: How to separate automatic inventory accounts for good...
entry.content:
Hello @laclac_1842 

Goods issue movement type is determined from schedule line category settings, transaction VOV6, e.g.

So to have different movement types, you need to customize different schedule line categories and their determination. Effectively, you end up with separate SD document flows for each transaction type, e.g. regular sales, free of charge delivery etc.

You can use a shortcut and modify movement types with custom enhancement in sales order processing.

I suppose the public cloud allows SD document flows configuration, not sure about custom enhancements though.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Production Execution Duration Fiori App Actual duration not reflrcting
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP Release S4HANA 2022 FPS02, we are still not seeing data under Actual duration for majority of orders

There is difference between actual and planned duration. Any SAP note which is missing to be applied.

Regards

Nitin

entry.title: Re: Material Master Nomenclature
entry.content:
Hello @sagnikch 

As the legacy material number is 12 chars long, you can take it over directly to SAP as external material number. Material number in SAP is either 18 or 40 chars long, so the legacy numbers will fit nicely.

However bear in mind that external material numbering with any logic is not the best practice. Such logic will break sooner or later, business will come up with new requirements impacting the material numbering logic. However once a material is created, its number can't be changed. So there is no way to implement new requirements without recreating material master data. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: BADI/exit to add new operations with IW31

entry.title: Re: Vendor Return process
entry.content: Thankyou.

entry.title: Re: Vendor Return process
entry.content: Yes.

entry.title: Re: integration options avaliable in abap
entry.content:
I think this question needs to be asked from the "opposite end": not "what integration technologies are available in ABAP" (because the answer to that would be dozens of pages long...), but "what kind of data does my non-sap system expect", and then based on that, you can select the most appropriate ABAP integration tool.

So perhaps you can provide more details about your non-sap system and what kind of data it needs/can process? Then I can perhaps give some recommendations into which SAP technology you should look in more detail (Web Service Engine, PI/PO/CPI, Business Connector, low level C/C++ / Java / C# library like RFC lib or JCo, IDoc or EDI interface, etc. etc.)

In any case, here is a list of integration technologies that can be used with SAP Systems (only the ones that I know of):

RFC-based:

  • EDI subsystem
  • IDoc/ALE (transactional RFC)
  • NW RFC Lib for C/C++
  • JCo for Java
  • NCo for Microsoft .NET

HTTP-based:

  • ABAP classes around CL_HTTP_CLIENT & type G destinations (HTTP Client)
  • Internet Communication Framework (HTTP Server to make ABAP classes callable from the outside)
  • IDoc/ALE (HTTP/XML-based)
  • WebService Engine (you can generate WSDLs for the APIs you want to provide as well as import WSDLs of external APIs you want to consume)
  • Netweaver Gateway (for OData and REST-based communication)

Bridge between RFC and HTTP (or FTP or Email) -- middleware based:

  • SAP Business Connector (provides many different integration tools out-of-the-box, e.g. network protocols like HTTP, FTP, SMTP, IMAP, POP3, JDBC and data transformation tools like graphical mappings, encryption, digital signature, zip/gzip, Base64, XML parser&renderer, HTML parser, IDoc and EDI mappings, custom Java or C/C++ routines)
  • PI/PO (similar to SAP BC but with a different focus: strong points are more on "store & forward" (asynchronous scenarios) and on latest WebService/OData/REST standards)
  • CPI (Cloud-based PI/PO system)

In general, these middleware-based solutions talk RFC towards the SAP System and then convert the SAP-proprietary RFC-data into other data formats suitable for HTTP/FTP/Email/JDBC (CSV, XML, SOAP, OData, JSon, whatever) and forward it to a third-party system or external business partner.

But again: if you describe in some detail, what your non-sap system needs or provides and in which direction the communication is going to take place (SAP --> non-SAP, non-SAP --> SAP, bidirectional), I can give more specific recommendations of what would be the best way to integrate it with an SAP System.

entry.title: Re: Tcode to see factory calendar like our Mobile calenda...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu 

You can get a very decent factory calendar overview in SCAL, e.g.

Is it not good enough?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP MM
entry.content:
Hi

To write a Functional Specification Document (FSD) in SAP, follow these steps

1. Title Page
Title Functional Specification Document
Project Name
Document Number
Date
Author

2. Introduction
Purpose State the purpose of the document.
Scope Define the scope of the functionality to be developed.

3. Requirements
Business Requirements Describe the business need and objectives.
Functional Requirements Detail what the system should do, including inputs, outputs, and processing logic.

4. Process Flow
Flow Diagrams Include any process flow diagrams or data flow diagrams if needed.

5. Data Requirements
Data Elements Specify data fields, structures, and any data sources involved.

6. User Interface
Screens Describe the user interface, including mock-ups if possible.

7. Assumptions and Constraints
Assumptions Any assumptions made during the specification.
Constraints Constraints or limitations to be aware of.

8. Acceptance Criteria
Define the criteria that will be used to test the functionality.

9. Appendices
Include any additional information or references.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
HI, thanks for this post. I am already on unit 5 of Discovering End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise, it seems that what I like the most is the SAP SuccessFactors solution I hope you can give me some guidance on where I should start, and what part you would recommend for SAP SF Consultant. 

 

My history: I am not from a tech background, I have been working in my country's Tax administration for over 15 years and we have been using SAP CRM and ERP since 2016. I am not a fan of finance taxes and accounting, so I want to change my profession completely.

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC Training and hands on experience
entry.content:
Hi @Gurpreet_Saroye,

Besides  the SAP Learning Hub subscription we offer a discounted student rate. 
Please access our student zone of SAP Learning website. there you can find the details. 
In addition we run digital skills initiative by SAP to boost your career with digital skills - Open new career opportunities with free learning and certification. 
Please check our Digital skills for SAP website to check if you are eligible to take part.

Kind regrds
Margit

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I'm new to SAP and am excited about the opportunity to join the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. I come from an IT background with a focus on cloud computing and infrastructure management. With my experience in cloud services, as well as a strong foundation in technical support and customer service, I believe that expanding my skills in SAP technologies will greatly contribute to my professional growth.

I am particularly interested in the following certifications:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud
  • Installing and Administering SAP HANA

Thank you for consideration.

entry.title: Mass changes Equipment master in PM module
entry.content:
I need to make mass changes of Equipment master.
For example, to assign a different value of Cost centre to 1000 objects (Equipment master). How can I do it?
LSMW doesn't work and W is restricted in the context of data migrations to SAP S/4HANA (note 2287723)

Migration Cockpit is intended for initial data load - not for change. 
What should I do? Create ABAP-program for each case?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Mass changes Equipment master in PM module
entry.content: You can use the Mass Change feature in transaction IE05 to make changes to multiple equipments. Alternatively, for large volumes of data you could utilise BAPI_EQUI_CHANGE to develop a custom specific utility.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA for product Compliance NEW Dangerous Goods Ma...
entry.content: Hi Ajit. I have not performed the compliance assessment step for dangerous goods; this is the step that does not trigger. I am expecting for this assessment step to appear as soon as I have assigned the compliance purpose and roles as per the 3FC best practices test script.

entry.title: Re: RNIF adapter in CPI !
entry.content: Hi,It doesn't seem like SAP is interested in implementing an RNIF adapter in BTP. The decision on whether such an adapter will be developed has just been postponed to Q4/2025. We also urgently need such an adapter and will now likely have to look for alternatives.

entry.title: Re: RNIF adapter in CPI !
entry.content: Hi. It doesn't seem like SAP is interested in implementing an RNIF adapter in BTP. The decision on whether such an adapter will be developed has just been postponed to Q4/2025. We also urgently need such an adapter and will now likely have to look for alternatives.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Ahmed, and I'm thrilled to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work in an organization focused on providing comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. Our mission is to empower companies to fully leverage the potential of SAP solutions.

I'm eager to dive into the SAP world and learn from the expertise within this community. I'm also keen on sharing my knowledge and experiences as I grow in my SAP journey.

Feel free to connect with me via private message. I'm excited to get started!

entry.title: Re: How to separate automatic inventory accounts for good...
entry.content:
Good afternoon @laclac_1842,

As of now, in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales, we can’t configure the schedule line categories. So we can't change the Movement type information. We need to use the standard configuration provided by SAP.

Regarding your requirement, I suggest you go through the link below. It might help you.

Setting Up Account Determination

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM: Can we have components in the Sales BOM fr...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check there is no option to choose plant at line item level.

Regards,

entry.title: Create Order window to pick Order Type based on Notification field value
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP standard functionality for Work order creation from Notification (IW21/IW22) is that once we click on the create button adjacent to Order field, the "Create Order" window pops-up. Based on Order-Notification Integration in SPRO, the Work Order type is proposed automatically along with additional data like default Work center and Planner Group. 

Now as per our client requirement we have 02 Order Types (PMA1 & PMA2)  for a single Notification type (Z1). We have 02 priorities (F1 & F2). Our requirement is that if F1 is selected then PMA1 appears in Create Order window or PMA2 when F2 priority is selected. 

Will appreciate inputs on this requirement.

Regards

Faisal

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC Training and hands on experience
entry.content:

the Practice Systems are sold as a bundle, with the price you have access to all practice systems avaiable.

 

best regards

Jennifer Hauck

entry.title: Ariba CLID Integration to SAP S/4 Hana On-prem
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on the Ariba CLID Integration with SAP S/4 HANA on-prem. We have enabled the required parameters in ICM and able to see the Send to External System option in Ariba Contract workspace against the Line-item document. We have maintained the required master data in the External system integration and after we click on send to External system, we get a success message also in Contract Workspace.

However, we are not able to see this triggering any document in CIG or Business network, its like we clicked on Send to External system and nothing triggered on the system. Can some one please throw some light on what are we missing here? Once we click on Send to External system, where should we check the Contract is sent to S/4 Or not or how to trouble shoot?

NOTE: I went through the standard links in help.sap.com, but there were not helpful, any help on this would be very much appreciated.

 

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM: Is it possible to have Sales BOM that coul...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

It is possible enter service and material items.

 

For the material choose Item category as L and for the service choose item category as N.

 

Hope it is helpful if any please revert.

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to connect to SAP HANA DB using X.509 certificate in hdbuserstore
entry.content:
How does this work for secondary DB connection?

Lets say my main ERP system is connected to DB via x509 authentication and now I also need to establish secondary DB connection to another SAP system (via dbacockpit).

entry.title: Re: In SAC, using the Data Export API, how do I export th...
entry.content:
Looking at the blog

SAP Analytics Cloud Export Data API Sample Scripts - SAP Community

Q2: When retrieving a dimension the column 'parent' (that is used by SAP Analytics Cloud for hierarchical data structures) is not returned, why is this?

A2: The hierarchy is part of an internal hierarchy extension and doesn't form part of the data retrieval and they don't form part of the API. There are no plans to change this.

 

One of the workaround is that we'll just have to create new dimension attributes and manually copy the hierarchy values into there so it becomes data and can be exported.  It's a bit of a pain.

entry.title: Re: ONE PR FOR MULTIPLE PROJECT DEMAND IN SAP PUBLIC CLOUD PS MODULE
entry.content: Is this bug resolved? Because I see the same error in 2402 and 2408.

entry.title: Re: How to completely refresh table control in dynpro
entry.content:
The list of components of CXTAB_CONTROL (TC_0300 in your case) are described in CONTROLS, TYPE TABLEVIEW - ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com).

TC_0300-TOP_LINE = 1.

entry.title: Adobe Document Services on SLES 15 SP6 non latin characters - warning !!!
entry.content:
Hello

If someone thinks about upgrading it's SAP Netweaver  Adobe Document Services installation to SLES 15 SP6 and is using non latin characters on printouts - do not proceed !!

It is not possible to print non latin characters then. There is no fix yet - you'll need to go back to SLES SP 5.

Regards

Marcin

entry.title: oData Parameters edm.DateTime -> initial / emptyValues ?
entry.content:
Hello,

we have created a SAP BW4 Query as oData.
The oData-Service is propagated correctly. Due to our authorization concept, we need to "preFilter" the results using the parameters. e.g.
..../sap/opu/odata/sap/<servicename>_SRV/<servicename>(ZVKORG='1111',ZCOUNTRY='DE',....)/Results?$select=.......

Now we have aQuery-Variable ref. to 0DATE (e.g. CreatedOn). The generated oData-service has the edm-type dateTime, non-mandatory.

Now some datasets have no value for CreatedOn, so it is initial. in DB 000000.
While using this preFiltering we have to input a valid DateTime in URL-Call, e.g:
Z_CREATEDON=datetime'0001-01-01T00:00:00',Z_CREATEDONTo=datetime'9999-12-31T23:59:59'

How should the call look like, when i want to get all data? With all i mean, also all datasets which have a initial mentioned date.

Thx in advanced

entry.title: Re: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content: It should take two minutes for you to verify.

entry.title: Re: Can I write a stored procedure that will require the...
entry.content:
Hi, this stored procedure

IF @transaction_type IN (N'A','U') AND
(@Object_type = '2')
begin
if exists(select T0."CardCode" from OCRD T0
INNER JOIN OCPR T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode]
where
T1.[E_MailL] is null and T0."CardCode" = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del )
begin
SET @error = -77
SET @error_message = 'It is mandatory to enter your e-mail address..'
end
end

entry.title: Re: Can I write a stored procedure that will require the E-Mail field in the contact person tab with
entry.content: IF @transaction_type IN (N'A','U') AND (@Object_type = '2') begin if exists(select T0."CardCode" from OCRD T0 INNER JOIN OCPR T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode] where T1.[E_MailL] is null and T0."CardCode" = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del ) begin SET @error = -77 SET @error_message = 'It is mandatory to enter your e-mail address.' end end

entry.title: How to find the history of concurrent user session in SAP crystal server 2016
entry.content:
Hello @DellSC  !

#SAP Crystal Server

I would like to extract the current and history of concurrent user sessions in crystal server 2016. The backend is oracle database.  Is there any way to get the data from crystal server 2016 using sql queries or by any other way?

Many thanks in advance.

Regards,

Shibin George.

entry.title: Re: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content:
In the BAdI implementation did you

  • (wrong) use a MESSAGE statement to raise an error
  • (good) fill the CT_FINCHDEL with document number and message variable

entry.title: Re: The print button I created in the toolbar is not work...
entry.content:
Hi ,
I noticed that the problem can be solved by using "go_gr->set_visible( abap_false )" and "go_gr->set_visible( abap_true)" where relevant. Thanks.

entry.title: Full view in collaboratio hub is automatically changed to window mode when moved to link diagram
entry.content: In Collaboration hub, when we are viewing processes in full view mode - we were able to move from one process to another linked process in the full view mode. But currently, when we try to navigate, it escapes from the full view mode when it is moving to the linked process and we need to again click on the full view mode. Is there a way to stay the full view mode throughout while navigating thru the linked processes?

entry.title: Re: Full view in collaboratio hub is automatically changed to window mode when moved to link diagram
entry.content: # In Navigation Map

entry.title: Re: Migration of EHANA to Datasphere by leveraging Native HANA Cloud Instance of Datasphere Tenant
entry.content:
Thank you @shabana , @VishalM89  for sharing your thoughts.

This blog is purely about migrating legacy EHANA Model to Datasphere which anyway will not consist of advanced analytics capabilities you have highlighted. So if someone can help sharing risks or limitations pertaining hosting calculation views in native HANA DB of Datasphere will definitely help customers assessing this option with actual risks and limitations.

entry.title: Information about Inbound API for test management in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Need information about an Inbound API that can feed data about a test script from a Non-SAP system to SAP Cloud ALM. Please let us know about any such Inbound API to SAP Cloud ALM.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Information about Inbound API for test management in...
entry.content:
As of today, the only SAP Cloud ALM API related to SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation testing is the Test Automation API. For detailed information about the capabilities of the API, refer to the documentation: 

  • API Guide for SAP Cloud ALM - Test Automation API
  • SAP Business Accelerator Hub - SAP Cloud ALM - Test Automation API overview

Development is currently working on additional SAP Cloud ALM APIs for test cases.
The planned delivery period in the SAP Road Map explorer entry is subject to change and may be altered.

When the new APIs are released, they will be announced on the What's New for SAP Cloud ALM APIs page.

entry.title: Now Presenting: Download and Upload of Pages between Systems
entry.content:
Autors: Sylvia Strack, Kattia Jordan-Philipp

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the transport of spaces and pages from a development system to a test or production system (3 system landscape), or from a quality system to a production system (2 system landscape) is done via Software Collection (see System Landscape and Transport Management | SAP Help Portal).

However, so far there was no option to transfer spaces and pages created in a starter system to a development or quality system. You had to manually re-create the spaces and pages in the other (target) system which was time- and effort-consuming.

We can share good news, since this situation changes now.

To create a space is a straightforward activity. However, to create a page demands more time and effort.

With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain 2408, and SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Release 2408, SAP releases the download and upload functionality for pages. The functionality focuses on pages only and not on spaces.  

Download and upload of pages is an easy task. It requires the following steps:

Source System:

  1. Logon to the source system (e.g., the Starter system) where you have the page(s) you want to take over to the target system.
  2. Open the Manage Launchpad Pages app.
  3. Select one or multiple pages that you want to take over into another system, e.g., into the Development system.
  4. Press Download on the upper right above the list of pages.

  5. A file of type JSON with the information of the selected pages is created on your computer.


    Target System:

    1. Logon to the target system (e.g., the Development system into which you want to take over the pages you created in the Starter system).
    2. Open the Manage Launchpad Pages app.
    3. Press Upload on the upper right above the list of pages.



    4. Click on Browse and select the previously created JSON file from your computer and click Next.


      Please note, if you are on the SAP BTP ABAP Environment, then you need to enter a transport, that you have created upfront, into the Transport field:



    5. Before the actual upload takes place, a dialog appears with two tabs: the tab Pages That Can Be Uploaded and the tab Pages That Can’t Be Uploaded. For each page that cannot be uploaded, you get the information explaining the reason. A possible reason could for example be that you try to upload a page, that already exists on the target system, by having the same page ID.
      In the tab Pages That Can Be Uploaded, you need to select all pages that you intend to upload to the system. Press Upload and the pages from the JSON file will be uploaded.



    6. The desired pages are imported and shown in the pages list. Continue working with the pages as required. This includes for example, to assign the uploaded pages to spaces in your system.


    We hope the download and upload functionality helps you optimize your pages creation and supports you to achieve greater efficiency and reuse.

    Documentation

    SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Uploading and Downloading Pages | SAP Help Portal

    SAP Integrated Business Planning: Uploading and Downloading Pages | SAP Help Portal

    SAP BTP ABAP Environment Uploading and Downloading Pages | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM: Is it possible to have Sales BOM that coul...
entry.content:
@Raju_Mane,

Thank you for your response—I appreciate it.

I’d like to clarify how the sales BOM is handled in the Sales Order. From what I understand, a delivery is created for products, but not for services. Additionally, the financial treatment for products and services differs.

Does SAP typically recommend combining products and services in a Sales BOM as a standard practice?

entry.title: Re: Dump Created while fetching data TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED
entry.content:
Thank U I Implemented the logic. Now while fetching the records. I mean while calling the Query no dump. but there is Final internal table like rt_output here I am getting the dump No more memory available to add rows to an internal table-TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED .... I am thinking final internal table not able to to hold huge data... Any advice. 

    "Using Cursor Technique to improve the performance
    " Open cursor for fetching data in packages
    OPEN CURSOR WITH HOLD @LV_cursor FOR
      SELECT objectclas, objectid, changenr, username, udate, utime, tcode
      FROM cdhdr
    WHERE objectclas IN @LR_objectclas
      AND username IN @s_user
      AND udate IN @LR_daterange.

    DO.
*      " Fetch data in chunks
      FETCH NEXT CURSOR lv_cursor INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_temp_cdhdr PACKAGE SIZE lv_package_size.

      " Exit the loop if no more data
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        EXIT.
      ENDIF.

      SORT  lt_temp_cdhdr BY objectclas objectid changenr.

      CLEAR lt_dcdhdr.
      " Append fetched records to the final table
      APPEND LINES OF lt_temp_cdhdr TO lt_dcdhdr.


      IF lt_dcdhdr IS NOT INITIAL.
        SELECT objectclas, objectid, changenr, tabname, tabkey, fname, chngind, value_new, value_old FROM cdpos INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_dcdpos)
          FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_dcdhdr
          WHERE objectclas = @LT_dcdhdr-objectclas AND objectid = @LT_dcdhdr-objectid  AND changenr  = @LT_dcdhdr-changenr.

        IF  lt_dcdpos IS NOT INITIAL.
          SELECT bname, name_first, name_last FROM user_addr INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_duser_addr)
           FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_dcdhdr
            WHERE bname = @LT_dcdhdr-username.

          IF lt_duser_addr IS NOT INITIAL.
            SELECT bname, persnumber, addrnumber FROM usr21 INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_dusr21)
              FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_duser_addr
              WHERE bname = @LT_duser_addr-bname.

            IF lt_dusr21 IS NOT INITIAL.
              SELECT addrnumber, persnumber, date_from, consnumber,smtp_addr, smtp_srch FROM adr6 INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_dadr6)
                FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_dusr21
                WHERE persnumber = @LT_dusr21-persnumber.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.

        SORT lt_dcdpos BY changenr.
        SORT lt_duser_addr BY bname.
        SORT lt_dusr21 BY bname.
        SORT lt_dadr6 BY persnumber.
        LOOP AT lt_dcdhdr INTO DATA(ls_dcdhdr).
          READ TABLE lt_dcdpos WITH KEY changenr = ls_dcdhdr-changenr INTO DATA(ls_dcdpos) BINARY SEARCH.
          READ TABLE lt_duser_addr WITH KEY bname = ls_dcdhdr-username INTO DATA(ls_duser_addr) BINARY SEARCH.
          READ TABLE lt_dusr21 WITH KEY bname = ls_duser_addr-bname INTO DATA(ls_dusr21) BINARY SEARCH.
          READ TABLE lt_dadr6 WITH KEY persnumber = ls_dusr21-persnumber INTO DATA(ls_dadr6) BINARY SEARCH.

          APPEND VALUE #( uname  = ls_dcdhdr-username
                          udate  = ls_dcdhdr-udate
                          utime  = ls_dcdhdr-utime
                          tcode  = ls_dcdhdr-tcode
                          Objvale = ls_dcdhdr-objectid
                          tabname = ls_dcdpos-tabname
                          fname   = ls_dcdpos-fname
                          valueold = ls_dcdpos-value_old
                          valuenew = ls_dcdpos-value_new
                          fstname = ls_duser_addr-name_first
                          lstname = ls_duser_addr-name_last
                          email = ls_dadr6-smtp_addr ) TO rt_output.

          CLEAR:ls_dcdhdr,ls_dcdpos,ls_duser_addr,Ls_dusr21,ls_dadr6.
        ENDLOOP.
      ENDIF.
    ENDDO.

    CLOSE CURSOR lv_cursor.

entry.title: Re: CJ20N - User Specific field issue
entry.content: This question does not seem to be Connectivity-related. If you would like to get an answer, you should add more fitting tags. For now I have added the tags for Order Management and Sales. Hope this is correct for attracting the attention of the relevant experts. (My application level know-how is very limited...)

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM: Can we have components in the Sales BOM fr...

I understand that there is no option to select a plant at the line item level when creating the sales BOM master data, as the BOM is plant-specific. However, during sales order processing, does the system allow for updating the plant data of the components to a plant different from the one where the master data was originally created?

ND

If you want an answer, you should add the correct application level tags to get the attention of the relevant experts in that field. (For now, I have added some tags for Order Management, but no idea, whether this is correct... I am not an application level expert.)

entry.title: Re: The print button I created in the toolbar is not work...
entry.content: Yes, it's one of the 2 solutions I have indicated.

entry.title: Re: RAP CDS annotation based custom action triggering aut...
entry.content:
Hi Shivaraj,  

Navigation is triggered only if a single instance is returned by the action and if the returned instance is not the same as the instance used when the action was triggered. The navigation is only triggered if the action was executed successfully and if the manifest has navigation defined for the context that is returned.

You can avoid sending back different unique context to avoid navigation to OP . Does it works for your use case?

Currently there is no manifest setting in Fiori elements OData V2 to stop navigation.

entry.title: Re: 🔵 SAP HANA Cloud Multi-Model
entry.content: Dears, could you give us some documents for the benefits/positive impacts of SAP Cloud in energy sector?

entry.title: Request for Guidance on Transferring Assets to New Company Codes
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We're operating in an SAP S/4HANA public cloud environment and have recently created two new company codes.

We need guidance on how to transfer existing assets from the existing company codes to these newly created company codes. A step-by-step process would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Dump Created while fetching data TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED
entry.content:
You have changed your code to finally no advantage because you consume exactly the same amount of memory (RT_OUTPUT). The goal of loading by package is to process each package, free the memory, then process the next package, etc. So, change your code accordingly.

Note that the "death trio" STANDARD TABLE, SORT and BINARY SEARCH, have been obsolete for 20 years. Only use SORTED TABLE.

entry.title: Re: po should not editable after grn
entry.content: Hi Vikas,

Thanks

Prameel

entry.title: TR not created with 311 movement in MIGO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am doing transfer posting from 'X' loaction to 'Y' location for a ABC material. Whereas, ABC material is WM managed and X, Y sloc are assigned to WH. But, when the transfer posting is done with 311 movemnt type TR is not created. therefore, PCN is creating.
kindly suggest for any configurations to be done.
i maintained the config in - LE>>WM>>interfaces>>define movement types>>LE-WM Interface to Inventory Management.
Refmvt type WM as 311 

Movement type as 309 

TR creation as X

Thanks,

Saikumar
